notes: Attach files straight to a chat. Drag a file onto the window and you'll see two drop zones — drop on the LEFT to attach it to the open chat, or on the RIGHT to file it into Rounds as before. Inside a chat, the new paperclip lets you attach a document (to this chat, or to Rounds). Attachments show inline — images as small previews, other files as thumbnails — and a click opens them in the native Preview app.
